---
title: "🗓️ Week 11 - Vegetation Indices"
---

In this week, we will learn about *vegetation indices*


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

We'll learn:

- [What is a Vegetation Index?](https://eo4geocourses.github.io/IGIK_Sentinel2-Data-and-Vegetation-Indices/#/)?


## **Practical exercises**:


#### Compute a vegetation index from Sentinel-2 imagery
::: {.callout-important collapse="false"}
[Replicate and publish this notebook](https://rpubs.com/ials2un/sentinel2_ts). It is part of Informe 2.
:::


## 📚 Homework

Study [this article](https://www.mdpi.com/1424-8220/25/12/3817). Take note of the formulas for the vegetation indices described in Section 2.2. You will need them for Examen 2.
